name: St. Matthews
distanceFromFacility: Approximately 8–12 miles east of the facility
transitNote: Accessible via I-64 west and Shelbyville Road. Driving time is typically 15–25 minutes. TARC bus service connects St. Matthews to central Louisville along multiple corridors.
localContext: St. Matthews is a city within Jefferson County, KY, just east of downtown Louisville with a population of roughly 17,000. As part of Greater Louisville, St. Matthews residents have full access to Kentucky Medicaid managed care plans and to Louisville-based substance use disorder treatment facilities including Golden Grove Recovery.
